title: melissa arvensis
intro: Melissa arvensis, also known as field balm or sweet Melissa, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melissa arvensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Melissa arvensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
